productDisplayName: Nike Men Max Run Lite White Sports Shoes
description: Offering premium cushioning in a lightweight design, the nike Air Max Run Lite+ shoe offers absolute support and breathable comfort to make your runs all the more fun. The welded plastic support at the midfoot and streamlined stability Air Sole unit with a foam pillar construction make this a perfect shoe for those runners who demand that extra stability and cushioning.UpperHeavily meshed upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced breathable comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised FitCushioned tongue and collar for snug comfortPadded footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protectionRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole with a visible nike Air unit in the heel for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs for optimal traction on various surfacesFlex grooves for ease of movementShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
